description_long: This kiosk is designed in the playful shape of a pink juice box, complete with a protruding white straw on top. The front features a recessed service window with a striped awning in shades of red, white, and gray, and a counter for transactions. To the left of the kiosk, there is a freestanding menu board with a pale frame and a visible list of offerings. The sides of the kiosk are decorated with large, outlined geometric shapes, adding a whimsical, cartoon-like aesthetic. The rear is plain, with a solid pink surface and no openings or features. The overall structure appears compact and portable, suitable for use as a street-side refreshment or snack stand.
description: A compact, pink juice box-shaped kiosk with a striped awning, service window, and a freestanding menu board. Features playful geometric accents and a white straw detail on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service window with striped awning, counter, and the menu board positioned to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the geometric panel design, the protruding straw, and the side profile of the menu board and awning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain pink surface with no windows or openings, and the back of the menu board.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the geometric panel design and the side profile of the awning and counter.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on a freestanding menu board to the left of the kiosk, with visible text listing menu items
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular service window at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a white straw detail protruding from the top, no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: playful, cartoon-inspired modern style with minimalist geometric accents
